channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Nearly 4 in 10 Americans keep a 'junk drawer' of old electronics, driven by a specific anxiety
item.description: NSF-funded research on 4,000 consumers reveals that a particular anxiety arises precisely at the moment of disposal.

item.title: Oil continues to flow through Hormuz despite Iran's claim of closure
item.description: Three laden oil supertankers, with a combined capacity of 6 million barrels, were detected sailing through the channel on Saturday.

item.title: Quartz countertops become the new asbestos for workers who cut them
item.description: Over 550 California workers have developed an incurable lung disease from fabricating engineered stone for major retailers.

item.title: Ground beef prices have risen 20% from last year, and a parasite, drought, and a July 1 trade deadline could drive them higher
item.description: The U.S. cattle herd is at its smallest since the 1950s, and Trump's USMCA threat could make the beef price crisis permanent.
